title: Netmeds Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Netmeds Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Netmeds Holdings Services family as a Full Stack Developer in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Netmeds Holdings Services:
Netmeds Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds Holdings Services!
